request_payload.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, I support increasing defense spending to ensure our national security. It's concerning that some allies have reduced their commitments, leaving us to bear more of the burden. We can't afford to cut back on preparedness when threats are evolving. Let's prioritize strong deterrence while protecting civil liberties. #NationalSecurity #DefenseBudget
